title: Shāhzādpur Heat Wave
lead: Shāhzādpur is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.00. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Shāhzādpur has led to extremely high temperatures, resulting in a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 82%, and the wind speed is 13.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat-related issues. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense pressure due to the prolonged heat wave, with no relief in sight.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat wave mitigation measures to protect the city's residents and infrastructure.
